specific_question: In Q4 2025, what happened when a virtual doctor recommended a patient see a specialist or get lab work, and what confusion did this create?
answer: In Q4 2024, doctors could provide referral recommendations and requisitions through the platform, but patients had to independently book with external specialists and labs. 31% of patients contacting support were confused about whether MediConn coordinated these appointments or if they must do it themselves.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
